---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to documentation, patterns, components, or the playground
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to improve or add?

<!-- A clear description of what you are proposing. -->

## Type of contribution

- [ ] New pattern specification
- [ ] Improvement to an existing pattern
- [ ] New component specification
- [ ] Documentation improvement (FAQ, glossary, guides)
- [ ] Playground feature
- [ ] CI or tooling improvement
- [ ] New industry configuration (YAML)
- [ ] Schema improvement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Is this covered by existing patterns?

<!-- Before proposing a new pattern, check docs/taxonomy/ and docs/patterns/. 
     If this is handled by a combination of existing patterns, describe why that is insufficient. -->

## Use case

<!-- Describe the real deployment scenario that motivates this request.
     Enterprise or regulated-industry use cases are given priority. -->

## What would success look like?

<!-- How would you know this is done? What would the output be? -->

## Have you read the contributing guide?

- [ ] Yes — I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [docs/glossary.md](../../docs/glossary.md)

## Additional context

<!-- References, examples, related patterns, or links to related issues. -->
